payload.answer: The input is an attempted article/URL source reference, but the article content is unavailable due to a malformed URL and reported 404 network error. Classify as URL fetch failure; do not treat article contents as available.

entity_resolution.reason: Input appears to reference an article URL, but the URL is malformed/punctuated and the mock fetch result indicates a 404 network error; no durable source content boundaries can be established beyond the user-provided reference.

details: Fetch failed with mock 404 network error.
No memory content extracted or committed.

repair_options: Ask the user to provide a valid article URL.
Ask the user to paste the article text directly.
